mutation_space.rationale: Shift reaction speed while holding the slow anchor fixed.
Re-anchor the trend horizon without stacking other changes.
Tighten or loosen the anti-chop gate.
Change stop responsiveness through ATR memory only.
Tighten or loosen the static volatility stop.
Test whether the family benefits from adding pullback continuation entries.
Swap the smoothing model without changing the causal family.
Check whether short-side participation is degrading the parent.
Check whether long-side participation is degrading the parent.
Reserve the first cheap black-box mutation for later, only after the white-box parent survives broader history.
